overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game depicting a lone character with an illuminated backpack traversing rocky mountain terrain at night. The character walks from a cliff edge overlooking distant city lights through increasingly enclosed rock formations, with the camera following steadily from behind and above.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff edge overlooking distant city

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cliff edge carrying a large illuminated backpack

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation running along the left side of the path
cluster of illuminated buildings visible in the distance across the dark landscape
uneven rocky ground with scattered boulders and gravel

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character along a narrow cliff edge at night. A massive rock wall looms on the left while distant city lights twinkle across the dark landscape ahead. The character walks steadily forward over the uneven rocky ground, their backpack emitting a soft glow in the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky plateau with scattered formations

events.description: character moves away from the cliff edge into more open rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing through the open rocky landscape moving away from the cliff

entered.detail: large isolated boulders and rock pillars scattered across the plateau

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the cliff edge, the scene opens into a wider rocky plateau. The distant city lights shift to the left as the character progresses forward. Large rock outcroppings and boulders dot the landscape on the right while the terrain remains barren and dark under the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass between tall rock walls

events.description: camera tilts upward to follow character ascending between rock walls, revealing the starry night sky

agents.ego_description: climbing upward through a narrow passage between rock walls

entered.detail: tall vertical rock wall forming the left boundary of the narrow passage
tall vertical rock wall forming the right boundary of the narrow passage
dark blue night sky with visible stars and clouds above the rock walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow mountain pass flanked by tall rock walls on both sides. As the character ascends, the camera tilts upward to capture the silhouette against the starry night sky. The distant city disappears from view, replaced by the dark blue heavens visible between the rocky canyon walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open cliffside overlooking a distant city into the enclosed depths of a narrow mountain pass. It begins by trailing a character along a narrow cliff edge at night, where a massive rock wall looms to the left and city lights twinkle across the dark horizon. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a wider rocky plateau with boulders dotting the landscape while the distant city lights shift toward the periphery. The environment then tightens as the character enters a narrow pass flanked by towering rock walls, causing the city to disappear from view. Finally, the camera tilts upward to capture the character's silhouette against a starry, dark blue sky visible between the canyon walls.
